predictions.text: Autonomous vehicle market will reach 8-10 trillion dollars globally in next 5-10 years, up from ~1 billion today
Humanoid robot market will reach 26 trillion dollars in 7-15 years as AI becomes embodied in physical form
Cost per mile for autonomous electric vehicles will drop to $0.25, versus $1.10 for past 100 years
Internal combustion engines have no competitive shot against EVs due to mature learning curve already exhausted
